advice.generic: Fetid Quillstorm creates circles during Muro’jin/Nekraxx; dodge the circles and avoid standing where future movement will be needed.
advice.healer: Prioritize Infected Pinions dispels while players dodge Quillstorm circles.
advice.dps: Do not tunnel during quill circles; keep bosses cleavable while moving.

1246666.name: Infected Pinions

advice.generic: Infected Pinions is a disease that adds group damage; remove it quickly when disease dispel is available.
advice.healer: Prioritize disease dispels here because leaving it up increases party pressure.
advice.dps: Use personal disease removal if you have it and healer dispel is overloaded.

1246666.notes: Disease that adds group damage; prioritize disease dispels.

advice.generic: Deathgorged Vessel causes passive damage and circles; keep moving out of circles while conserving defensives for overlaps.
advice.healer: Expect ongoing passive damage during Rak’tul and plan healing around circle-heavy moments.
advice.dps: Do not tunnel while circles spawn; uptime is secondary to not adding extra healer load.

advice.generic: Necrotic Convergence is only interruptible after the shield is broken; damage the shield first, then kick the channel.
advice.healer: Use cooldowns if the shield break is slow; damage ramps with time.
advice.dps: Do not kick early into the shield phase; save the interrupt for when the channel can actually be stopped.

advice.generic: Spiritbreaker is a tank combo that drops a large puddle and knocks back; tank moves away from the group and uses mobility/braziers to handle the knockback.
advice.tank: Use a defensive, move the combo away from the group, and avoid being knocked into bad space by using movement or the braziers.
advice.healer: Track the tank during the knockback/combo and be ready if they land far away or out of line.
advice.dps: Stay clear of the tank drop zone and do not follow the tank into the puddle path.

advice.generic: Kite the Wrest Phantoms adds so they collide with each other and explode, but stagger collisions so the healer can recover between blasts.
advice.tank: Help steer/position adds without letting them all explode at once.
advice.healer: Expect large recovery checks after each collision; call for staggered detonations if the group is low.
advice.dps: Use slows, stuns, and controlled movement to line up collisions one at a time.

advice.generic: Crush Souls targets three players and drops Soulbind Totems; place totems close together without cleaving allies, then kill them fast.
advice.healer: Watch the three targets as they place totems and the follow-up pull begins.
advice.dps: Swap to Soulbind Totems immediately; cleave them down before the pulls create chaos.

advice.generic: Soulbind Totems pull players while channeling; kill the totems quickly and avoid standing in overlapping placement circles.
advice.tank: Keep the boss stable near the totem pile so DPS can swap without losing uptime.
advice.healer: Be ready for players being pulled into danger if totems live too long.
advice.dps: Hard swap to totems; this is a priority mechanic, not passive cleave.

advice.generic: Soulrending Roar sends players into the bridge gauntlet; return quickly, avoid Lost Souls, and interrupt/CC Malignant Souls for the stacking buff.
advice.tank: Keep the boss controlled while players return; avoid forcing extra movement as they re-enter.
advice.healer: Withering Soul ramps while players are away, so be ready to stabilize them when they return.
advice.dps: Move fast through the gauntlet, avoid roots, and interrupt/CC the six Malignant Souls for Spectral Residue.

advice.generic: Eternal Suffering indicates sustained shadow pressure; use personals on overlaps and avoid adding avoidable hits during the window.
advice.healer: Plan efficient healing for sustained ticks rather than waiting for a single burst.
advice.dps: Use a defensive when low or when suffering overlaps with movement mechanics.

1256008.name: Hex
1256008.summary: An interruptible cast that polymorphs its target; dispel it if it lands.

advice.generic: Hex is avoidable with an interrupt; if it lands, dispel it immediately so the player is not CC’d during mechanics.
advice.healer: Magic dispel Hex quickly unless another dispel is more lethal.
advice.dps: Kick every Hex cast and help dispel if your class can.

1256008.notes: CC from a missed interrupt; dispel immediately if it completes.

advice.generic: Shadow Bolt is lower priority than Hex/Spirit Rend but should be kicked with spare interrupts to reduce random target damage.
advice.healer: Spot heal targets if casts get through.
advice.dps: Use spare kicks here after priority control casts are covered.

1256059.name: Rending Gore
1256059.summary: Unavoidable tank DoT pressure — healed through, not a bleed to cleanse.

advice.generic: Rending Gore is unavoidable tank DoT pressure, not a bleed-cleanse target despite the name.
advice.tank: Use defensives for applications and avoid assuming a cleanse will remove it.
advice.healer: Heal through it and plan externals if stacks/overlaps become dangerous.
advice.dps: Help reduce tank pressure with stops, slows, or off-healing rather than looking for a bleed dispel.

1256059.notes: DB2: no bleed/dispel mechanic — unavoidable DoT, heal through (NOT a bleed-cleanse target despite the name).

advice.generic: Rain of Toads creates avoidable circles; keep moving and avoid being boxed in by other ground effects.
advice.tank: Move the pull so players have room to dodge without spreading mobs everywhere.
advice.healer: Watch players who dodge late while healing absorb effects are active.
advice.dps: Move out early; do not finish a cast in the circle.

advice.generic: Ancestral Crush creates a circle and puddle; avoid the impact and do not fight in the leftover puddle.
advice.tank: Move the mob out of puddles so melee can continue safely.
advice.healer: Spot heal anyone clipped and be ready for passive Spectral Strikes damage in the same pulls.
advice.dps: Sidestep the impact and return after the puddle is clear.

1258806.name: Ritual Firebrand

advice.generic: Ritual Firebrand erupts repeatedly if left up; move circles away and remove the Magic debuff quickly.
advice.healer: Prioritize Firebrand dispels during Hex Guardian pulls because passive AoE is already high.
advice.dps: Move out with the debuff and use a personal if dispel is delayed.

1258806.notes: Magic debuff that erupts repeatedly; dispel quickly to reduce group pressure.

1259255.name: Spirit Rend

advice.generic: Spirit Rend is a dangerous Magic DoT from a missed cast; remove promptly.
advice.healer: Dispel the target unless another lethal dispel is active.
advice.dps: Use a defensive/self-dispel if your kick was missed and dispel is delayed.

1259255.notes: Dangerous Magic DoT from a missed interrupt; dispel promptly.

advice.generic: Soulstorms rotate around the Bound Defender; keep moving with the pattern rather than cutting through it.
advice.tank: Face the mob away for Vigilant Defense and position it so storms leave melee a safe arc.
advice.healer: Expect avoidable hits when players are forced to move through rotating storms.
advice.dps: Track the rotation and stay on the safe side of the mob.

advice.generic: During Rend Souls, avoid nearby Lost Souls; the channel can cause them to explode and root/damage players.
advice.tank: Keep the Hollow Soulrender positioned so players are not boxed into Lost Soul paths.
advice.healer: Be ready to dispel/root-break or heal players who get clipped by Lost Souls.
advice.dps: Create space from Lost Souls before the channel resolves; do not chase damage through them.

advice.generic: Umbral Vortex is a pull/zone style danger; move out of the vortex path and use movement early if it is dragging you into bad space.
advice.tank: Avoid tanking mobs where the vortex forces the group through other hazards.
advice.healer: Watch players who spend movement late and get pulled into follow-up damage.
advice.dps: Use movement before you are centered in the vortex.

advice.generic: Freezing Traps are bad unless used to stun Nekraxx during Carrion Swoop; targeted players can intentionally line the swoop through a trap.
advice.tank: Do not get knocked into traps accidentally while managing the bosses together.
advice.healer: Watch the Carrion Swoop target and be ready if the trap setup fails.
advice.dps: If targeted by the swoop, route it through an ice block/trap; everyone else stays out of the path.

advice.generic: Shadow Burst targets a player; spread so it does not cleave allies.
advice.healer: Spot heal the target if Shadow Burst overlaps other trash damage.
advice.dps: Move out with the circle/hit and do not stand on another player.

1266381.name: Hooked Snare

advice.generic: Hooked Snare is a root/bleed-style control problem; freedom/root-break the root and use bleed removal if your class can handle the bleed component.
advice.healer: Do not treat this as a normal healer cleanse unless your class can remove the relevant effect; help the target survive if they are stuck.
advice.dps: Interrupt or freedom the target; if you are hooked, call it and use movement/root break utility.

1266381.notes: DB2: root + bleed. Freedom/root-break for the root; bleed-cleanse for the bleed component.

1271623.name: Frost Nova

advice.generic: Frost Nova is a Magic root; dispel or root-break it when the target needs to move.
advice.healer: Cleanse it quickly if the player is in danger or near Lost Souls.
advice.dps: Use your own root break if available; do not sit rooted in the path of mechanics.

1271623.notes: Magic root; dispel or root-break when movement is required.
